name: Coconut Choco Cheesecake2
recipeInstructions:
BASE: Combine crumbs, sugar and margarine. Press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
BODY: Melt chocolate and margarine over low heat, stirring until smooth. Cool. Combine cream cheese, sugar and salt, mixing on electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in chocolate mixture and coconut; pour over crust. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
TOPPING: Combine sour cream, sugar and brandy; carefully spread over cheesecake. Bake at 300°F for 5 minutes. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan. Chill. Garnish with chocolate shavings, if desired.
